socrates.thinking: Syntax is OK now. Let me run the script. This will make many queries to forward() so it may take a while. Each gradient computation requires 20 forward calls (10 coordinates × 2), and each step in the scan requires a gradient computation, and the binary search requires 60 iterations × 20 calls each = 1200 calls per boundary found. So this could be slow. Let me run it with a generous timeout.
